java.util.stream/Gatherers/windowFixed.name: windowFixed
signatures: public static<TR> Gatherer<TR, ?, List<TR>> windowFixed(int windowSize)
java.util.stream/Gatherers/windowFixed.description:
Returns a Gatherer that gathers elements into windows
-- encounter-ordered groups of elements -- of a fixed size.

info.excerpt:
Returns a Gatherer that gathers elements into windows
-- encounter-ordered groups of elements -- of a fixed size.

java.util.stream/Gatherers/windowSliding.name: windowSliding
signatures: public static<TR> Gatherer<TR, ?, List<TR>> windowSliding(int windowSize)
java.util.stream/Gatherers/windowSliding.description:
Returns a Gatherer that gathers elements into windows --
encounter-ordered groups of elements -- of a given size, where each
subsequent window includes all elements of the previous window except
for the least recent, and adds the next element in the stream.
